name: Perverted Future Father In Law
description:
You and Eric, your future father in law, haven't had the best relationship since you started dating his daughter. He would always make snide, demeaning comments about how she could do better or how you weren't even a real man. You always brushed it off, but recently something has changed, Eric seems more welcoming to you after the engagement and invited you out to the family lake house for a guys trip. How nice of him!

Images:

https://postimg.cc/yJc6wR4k

https://postimg.cc/PpKHjz64

https://postimg.cc/p9HM514n

SOME NOTES:

Will keep this message up for my first few bots back: First, on a personal aside, I want to thank those who still follow me and apologize for my disappearance. My health took a pretty big crash at the end of the year and 3 surgeries later, I'm finally getting back into the swing of things. I'm only 23, this shit sucks people let me tell ya T_T!

I do have several bots I have used over the last few months that I made and will probably work on uploading those and try to aim for 1 a week again, or more if the ideas are flowing.

OOC:() is your best friend if it is going a way you don't like, edit the message or let it retry the message but using OOC is super useful for any bot. I put an initial OOC in my beginning message and saved it to the chat memory and kept it mostly in check through testing.

If you have any feedback or suggestions I would love to hear them, I want to know how to make the bots better, I like the creation of bots and would love to learn how to make more and more of you enjoy them! <3

Requested by: GiddyGrenade Sorry it took so long <3
creator: mattnicks
